                        <item>
            <title><![CDATA[High-speed trains collide in southern Spain, killing at least 20 people]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/high-speed-trains-collide-in-southern-spain-killing-at-least-20-people</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The evening train between Malaga and Madrid went off the rails near Córdoba and slammed into a train coming from Madrid to Huelva, according to rail operator Adif.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 17:52:34 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/high-speed-trains-collide-in-southern-spain-killing-at-least-20-people</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/spain"><![CDATA[Spain]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/train-derailment"><![CDATA[train derailment]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Suman Naishadham, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Joseph Wilson, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-18T212437Z_1606897711_RC2W3JA72IHD_RTRMADP_3_SPAIN-ACCIDENT-TRAIN-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Wildfires in Chile leave 18 dead and force thousands to flee]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/wildfires-in-chile-leave-18-dead-and-force-thousands-to-flee</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Wildfires raging across Chile on Sunday left at least 18 people dead, scorched thousands of acres of forest and destroyed hundreds of homes, authorities said.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 17:39:39 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/wildfires-in-chile-leave-18-dead-and-force-thousands-to-flee</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/chile"><![CDATA[Chile]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/wildfires"><![CDATA[wildfires]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Javier Torres, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-18T105936Z_1084320426_RC2J3JAXCX66_RTRMADP_3_CHILE-FIRE-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Southern California Edison files lawsuits claiming series of missteps made Eaton Fire more deadly]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/southern-california-edison-files-lawsuits-claiming-series-of-missteps-made-eaton-fire-more-deadly</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Southern California Edison has filed lawsuits accusing Los Angeles County, local water agencies and the Southern California Gas Company of a series of missteps that the utility says made last year's Eaton Fire more deadly.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 16:10:11 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/southern-california-edison-files-lawsuits-claiming-series-of-missteps-made-eaton-fire-more-deadly</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/califorina-wildfires"><![CDATA[califorina wildfires]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/eaton-fire"><![CDATA[eaton fire]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/lawsuit"><![CDATA[lawsuit]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/wildfires"><![CDATA[wildfires]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2025-07-04T043613Z_855569442_RC216CAX5J1S_RTRMADP_3_CALIFORNIA-WILDFIRES-ALTADENA-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[U.S.-based activist agency says it has verified 3,919 deaths from Iran protests]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-based-activist-agency-reports-at-least-3766-deaths-from-iran-protests</link>
            <description><![CDATA[A U.S.-based activist agency said Sunday it has verified at least 3,766 deaths during a wave of protests that swept Iran and led to a bloody crackdown, and fears the number could be significantly higher.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 15:06:30 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/u-s-based-activist-agency-reports-at-least-3766-deaths-from-iran-protests</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran"><![CDATA[Iran]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/iran-protests"><![CDATA[iran protests]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Elena Becatoros, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-18T192105Z_385601296_RC2U3JAK6Z2T_RTRMADP_3_IRAN-ECONOMY-PROTESTS-BRITAIN-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Army puts 1,500 soldiers on standby for possible Minnesota deployment]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/army-puts-1500-soldiers-on-standby-for-possible-minnesota-deployment</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The Pentagon has ordered about 1,500 active-duty soldiers to be ready in case of a possible deployment to Minnesota, two defense officials said Sunday.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 14:51:31 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/army-puts-1500-soldiers-on-standby-for-possible-minnesota-deployment</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/donald-trump"><![CDATA[Donald Trump news]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/insurrection-act"><![CDATA[Insurrection Act]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/minnesota"><![CDATA[minnesota]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Konstantin Toropin, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-18T001402Z_1329488488_RC293JAMEA24_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-MINNESOTA-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[FDA's new expedited drug program raises legal questions and concerns]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/fdas-new-expedited-drug-program-raises-legal-questions-and-concerns</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The FDA commissioner's effort to drastically shorten the review of drugs favored by President Donald Trump's administration is causing alarm across the agency.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 13:04:59 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/fdas-new-expedited-drug-program-raises-legal-questions-and-concerns</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/drugs"><![CDATA[drugs]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/fda"><![CDATA[FDA]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/Food-and-Drug-administration"><![CDATA[food and drug administration]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/marty-makary"><![CDATA[MARTY MAKARY]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Matthew Perrone, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-15T224228Z_1773975969_RC29XGAXTHOM_RTRMADP_3_HEALTH-USA-FDA-VOUCHERS-1024x673.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="673" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[More countries confirm invites to Trump's Board of Peace for rebuilding Gaza]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/more-countries-confirm-invites-to-trumps-board-of-peace-for-rebuilding-gaza</link>
            <description><![CDATA[At least seven more countries on Sunday said the United States has invited them to join President Donald Trump's "Board of Peace," a new body meant to oversee next steps in Gaza.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 11:35:07 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/more-countries-confirm-invites-to-trumps-board-of-peace-for-rebuilding-gaza</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/donald-trump"><![CDATA[Donald Trump news]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/gaza"><![CDATA[Gaza]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/israel"><![CDATA[Israel]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Cara Anna, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Josh Boak, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-16T161745Z_1345230850_RC2D2JA6786Y_RTRMADP_3_ISRAEL-PALESTINIANS-GAZA-1024x670.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="670" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[WATCH LIVE: Virginia Gov. Abigail Spanberger's address to state's General Assembly]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/watch-live-virginia-gov-abigail-spanbergers-address-to-states-general-assembly</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Spanberger made history Saturday when she was sworn in as the state's first woman governor.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sun, 18 Jan 2026 04:00:09 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/watch-live-virginia-gov-abigail-spanbergers-address-to-states-general-assembly</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/abigail-spanberger"><![CDATA[abigail spanberger]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/virginia"><![CDATA[virginia]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Steff Staples]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2025-11-05T032628Z_1928453760_RC21QHATEKXS_RTRMADP_3_USA-ELECTION-VIRGINIA-1024x632.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="632" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[European Union and Mercosur bloc sign landmark free trade agreement]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/european-union-and-mercosur-bloc-sign-landmark-free-trade-agreement</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The EU and the Mercosur bloc of South American countries formally signed a long-sought landmark free trade agreement on Saturday, capping more than 25 years of negotiations to strengthen commercial ties in the face of rising protectionism and global trade tensions.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 17 Jan 2026 18:10:08 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/european-union-and-mercosur-bloc-sign-landmark-free-trade-agreement</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/european-union"><![CDATA[European Union]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/free-trade-agreement"><![CDATA[free trade agreement]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/mercosur"><![CDATA[Mercosur]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/south-america"><![CDATA[South America]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/trade"><![CDATA[trade]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Nayara Batschke, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Isabel DeBre, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-17T172854Z_833801526_RC213JASFB15_RTRMADP_3_EU-MERCOSUR-PARAGUAY-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Thousands march in Greenland against Trump's threats to take over the Arctic island]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/thousands-march-in-greenland-against-trumps-threats-to-take-over-the-arctic-island</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Thousands of Greenlanders carefully marched across snow and ice to take a stand against U.S. President Donald Trump on Saturday.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 17 Jan 2026 16:50:05 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/thousands-march-in-greenland-against-trumps-threats-to-take-over-the-arctic-island</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/greenland"><![CDATA[greenland]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/protests"><![CDATA[protests]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Emma Burrows, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Daniel Niemann, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Stefanie Dazio, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-17T175809Z_2101756982_RC233JANK5UI_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-GREENLAND-PROTESTS-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Thousands rally in Serbia as university students protest corruption]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/thousands-rally-in-serbia-as-university-students-protest-corruption</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Protesters in Novi Sad, chanting "thieves," accused the government of rampant corruption that they believe also led to a November 2024 train station disaster in the city.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 17 Jan 2026 15:48:47 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/thousands-rally-in-serbia-as-university-students-protest-corruption</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/aleksandar-vucic"><![CDATA[Aleksandar Vucic]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/protests"><![CDATA[protests]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/serbia"><![CDATA[Serbia]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/university-students"><![CDATA[university students]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-17T185618Z_366795393_RC263JAQMIJT_RTRMADP_3_SERBIA-PROTESTS-1024x704.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="704" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[AP analysis shows 10% of U.S. House members have announced they're not running for reelection]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/ap-analysis-shows-10-of-u-s-house-members-have-announced-theyre-not-running-for-reelection</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Dozens of U.S. House members have announced they are not running for reelection. Some are seeking other offices, while others are retiring after decades of service.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 17 Jan 2026 14:01:32 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/ap-analysis-shows-10-of-u-s-house-members-have-announced-theyre-not-running-for-reelection</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/ap-analysis"><![CDATA[AP Analysis]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/congress"><![CDATA[congress]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/reelection"><![CDATA[reelection]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Maya Sweedler, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Hyojin Yoo, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Simran Parwani, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Pablo Barria Urenda, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Eunice Esomonu, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-15T220447Z_858053285_RC2GUIABQJCV_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-HEALTHCARE-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[New research shows eating less ultraprocessed food supports healthier aging]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/new-research-shows-eating-less-ultraprocessed-food-supports-healthier-aging</link>
            <description><![CDATA[A new study found older adults whose diets consisted of only 15% ultraprocessed foods – rather than the usual 50% – had lower weight, insulin and cholesterol. ]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 17 Jan 2026 12:53:47 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/health/new-research-shows-eating-less-ultraprocessed-food-supports-healthier-aging</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/aging"><![CDATA[aging]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/food"><![CDATA[food]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/healthbeat"><![CDATA[Health]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/nutrition"><![CDATA[nutrition]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/ultraprocessed-foods"><![CDATA[Ultraprocessed foods]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Moul Dey, The Conversation]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2025-04-22T190133Z_116055230_RC263EAU8O24_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-FDA-DYES-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Trump announces a 10% tariff on 8 European countries for opposing U.S. control of Greenland]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/trump-announces-a-10-tariff-on-8-european-countries-for-opposing-u-s-control-of-greenland</link>
            <description><![CDATA[President Trump said Saturday that he would charge a 10% import tax starting in February on goods from eight European nations because of opposition to U.S. control of Greenland.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 17 Jan 2026 12:47:21 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/trump-announces-a-10-tariff-on-8-european-countries-for-opposing-u-s-control-of-greenland</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/denmark"><![CDATA[Denmark]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/donald-trump"><![CDATA[Donald Trump news]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/europe"><![CDATA[europe]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/greenland"><![CDATA[greenland]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/tariffs"><![CDATA[tariffs]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Emma Burrows, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Josh Boak, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Daniel Niemann, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-16T204951Z_1190260948_RC2K2JAVIVZ2_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Search is underway for Indonesian plane with 11 people that vanished in mountainous region]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/search-is-underway-for-indonesian-plane-with-11-people-that-vanished-in-mountainous-region</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The turboprop ATR 42-500 operated by the Indonesia Air Transport was on its way from Yogyakarta to the capital city of South Sulawesi when it vanished from radar, said a spokesperson for the Transportation Ministry.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Sat, 17 Jan 2026 11:46:36 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/search-is-underway-for-indonesian-plane-with-11-people-that-vanished-in-mountainous-region</guid>

                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/plane-crash"><![CDATA[plane crash]]></category>

                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Justice Department investigates Minnesota Gov. Walz and Minneapolis Mayor Frey]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/justice-department-investigates-minnesota-gov-walz-and-minneapolis-mayor-frey</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The Justice Department is investigating whether Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz and Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey have impeded federal immigration enforcement through public statements they have made, according to two people familiar with the matter.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 16 Jan 2026 20:13:22 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/justice-department-investigates-minnesota-gov-walz-and-minneapolis-mayor-frey</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/justice-department"><![CDATA[Department of Justice]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/jacob-frey"><![CDATA[Jacob Frey]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/minneapolis"><![CDATA[minneapolis]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/minnesota"><![CDATA[minnesota]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/tim-walz"><![CDATA[Tim Walz]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Alanna Durkin Richer, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Eric Tucker, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Jack Brook, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-12T222131Z_923556735_RC2XZIALBXT2_RTRMADP_3_USA-TRUMP-MINNESOTA-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Defendant in Charlie Kirk's killing asks judge to disqualify prosecution team]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/defendant-in-charlie-kirks-killing-asks-judge-to-disqualify-prosecution-team</link>
            <description><![CDATA[The Utah man charged with killing conservative activist Charlie Kirk returned to court Friday, as his attorneys sought to disqualify prosecutors because the daughter of a deputy county attorney involved in the case attended the rally where Kirk was shot.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 16 Jan 2026 19:23:14 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/nation/defendant-in-charlie-kirks-killing-asks-judge-to-disqualify-prosecution-team</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/charlie-kirk"><![CDATA[charlie kirk]]></category>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/tyler-robinson"><![CDATA[tyler robinson]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Hannah Schoenbaum, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Matthew Brown, Associated Press]]></dc:creator>
                                                                <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/2026-01-16T210201Z_1775308251_RC2K2JACCS3J_RTRMADP_3_USA-SHOOTING-KIRK-1024x649.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="649" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Machado urges U.S. leaders to push for a democratic government in Venezuela]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/machado-urges-u-s-leaders-to-push-for-a-democratic-government-in-venezuela</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Venezuelan opposition leader Maria Corina Machado told an audience in Washington that she's confident democracy will return to her nation. But almost two weeks after the seizure of former President Maduro, Machado revealed little of her own plans. As Nick Schifrin reports, that hasn't stopped the Trump White House from engaging with the rest of the Maduro regime they left in place.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 16 Jan 2026 18:55:02 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/machado-urges-u-s-leaders-to-push-for-a-democratic-government-in-venezuela</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/democracy"><![CDATA[democracy]]></category>

                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/venezuela"><![CDATA[venezuela]]></category>
                                                        <dc:creator><![CDATA[Nick Schifrin]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Sonia Kopelev]]></dc:creator>
                                <dc:creator><![CDATA[Veronica Vela]]></dc:creator>

                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[News Wrap: Trump threatens tariffs for countries not supporting his Greenland takeover]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/news-wrap-trump-threatens-tariffs-for-countries-not-supporting-his-greenland-takeover</link>
            <description><![CDATA[In our news wrap Friday, President Trump ramped up his threats about taking over Greenland and suggested that he may place tariffs on countries that don't support the move, the Supreme Court says it will hear an appeal from Bayer to block thousands of state lawsuits claiming its Roundup weedkiller causes cancer and the Trump administration says it will delay involuntary student loan collections.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 16 Jan 2026 18:50:53 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/news-wrap-trump-threatens-tariffs-for-countries-not-supporting-his-greenland-takeover</guid>
                        <category domain="https://www.pbs.org/newshour/tag/news-wrap"><![CDATA[news wrap]]></category>
                                                            <media:content url="https://d3i6fh83elv35t.cloudfront.net/static/2026/01/newswrap-16-1024x683.jpg" medium="image" width="1024" height="683" />
                    </item>
                <item>
            <title><![CDATA[Musk's Grok AI faces more scrutiny after generating sexual deepfake images]]></title>
            <link>https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/musks-grok-ai-faces-more-scrutiny-after-generating-sexual-deepfake-images</link>
            <description><![CDATA[Elon Musk was forced to put restrictions on X and its AI chatbot, Grok, after its image generator sparked outrage around the world. Grok created non-consensual sexualized images, prompting some countries to ban the bot. Liz Landers discussed Grok's troubles with Riana Pfefferkorn of the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence.]]></description>
            <pubDate>Fri, 16 Jan 2026 18:45:21 -0500</pubDate>
            <guid isPermaLink="true">https://www.pbs.org/newshour/show/musks-grok-ai-faces-more-scrutiny-after-generating-sexual-deepfake-images</guid>
